children.text: make a grant in the amount of $660,000 to Guam;
make a grant in the amount of $350,000 to each of American Samoa and the Commonwealth of the Northern Mariana Islands; and
make a grant of $160,000 to the Republic of Palau, subject to subsection (b).

children.heading: Restriction
children.label: b Restriction
children.text: The Republic of Palau shall cease to be eligible to receive funding under this section upon entering into an agreement for an extension of United States educational assistance under the Compact of Free Association, unless otherwise provided in such agreement.
